prestazioni: 4.0L flat-six (MA1.76) naturally aspirated engine with a bespoke Bosch MS6.4 engine management system, featuring a 102mm bore and 81.5mm stroke, paired with a 13.3:1 compression ratio for peak power delivery at 9,250 RPM (510 HP) and 325 lb-ft of torque at 6,250 RPM. Upgraded with a custom Akrapović 6-into-2 titanium exhaust manifold and a straight-pipe system with 90mm diameter piping to optimize scavenging and reduce backpressure.

Ohlins TTX-40 4-way adjustable dampers with RSR-specific valving, paired with a 30mm front sway bar (adjustable in 3 positions) and a 24mm rear sway bar (adjustable in 5 positions) from the 911 RSR Cup car, along with spherical bearing-equipped Uniball top mounts for razor-sharp chassis response.

Porsche Motorsport carbon-ceramic brake system (PCCB) with 390mm front and 355mm rear rotors, featuring 6-piston front and 4-piston rear monobloc calipers, upgraded with Ferodo DS2500HT high-temperature brake pads and Motul RBF 660 racing brake fluid for consistent stopping power under extreme track conditions.
estetica: Full carbon fiber bodywork from the 911 RSR (991.2) homologation kit, including the iconic double-bubble roof, front splitter with integrated dive planes, and a massive 2,000mm-wide rear wing with adjustable Gurney flaps (3 positions) for optimized downforce.

BBS FI21R 18x13 front and 18x15.5 rear forged magnesium wheels with central locking, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (30/68-18 front, 31/71-18 rear) for maximum mechanical grip and heat resistance.

Custom livery inspired by the 2017-2019 WEC RSR cars, featuring a matte white base with Porsche Motorsport’s signature “Pink Pig” accents, including the iconic pig illustrations on the hood and doors, paired with a full-width LED light bar integrated into the front splitter for enhanced visibility during endurance racing.
